Diseases of Teeth : — (i) The Moon or Rahu posited in the
12th house. Saturn in a trine, and the Sun in the 7th or Sth
house, (ii) The above planets occupying Navamsas owned by
malefics in depression or in inimical houses, (iii) Lord of the
2nd house together with Rahu occupying a Dusthana along with
